description:
Expert metrology software for effortless and rapid 3D scan data capture.

Revo Measure is a professional 3D metrology software for accurate and quick scan-to-CAD comparisons and deviation analysis for quality control, reverse engineering, and industrial design applications.
1. Adds template measurement for batch measuring a single model, allowing users to create custom templates.
2. Adds cone feature support.
3. Adds batch feature creation from CAD models.
4. Adds distance measurement along the X, Y, and Z axes.
5. Adds point deviation measurement at specified locations.
6. Adds feature creation from a reference mesh model.
7. Adds model unit settings, supporting millimeters, centimeters, meters, inches, and feet.
8. Adds decimal precision settings for model data.
9. Adds a lasso selector.
10. Fixes some bugs.
11. Optimizes user experience for certain features.
